status: pipeline built and verified, training not yet run (training happens on Colab, not locally, per instruction)

sanity_check.description: src/kraken/infer.py's pageseg bug fix verified against the zero-shot (not fine-tuned) CATMuS pretrained model on 5 val_split images: no crashes, no exceptions, no empty/fallback predictions.
sanity_check.note: Output quality is poor (expected — zero-shot, unfine-tuned, on handwriting the base model has never seen). This only confirms the bug fix produces well-formed non-empty text, not that the model is accurate yet.

notes: Run runners/colab/train_kraken.ipynb to train, then re-run src/kraken/infer.py + src/metrics/weighted_wer_cer.py locally (or the notebook does this itself) to fill in the real scores here.
